description:
Goal
Move native-preparation state into compiler::World so destination lowering, type resolution, materialization, and ABI derivation enrich the same authoritative world instead of returning PreparedNativeProgram.

Signal
- compiler::World carries the native-preparation facts needed by backends.
- Codegen backends consume mutable world state through Compiler-owned driver methods.
- PreparedNativeProgram disappears from the public seam and no caller depends on a separate native prep package.
- Codegen pipeline tests still prove no replanning occurs during native emission.

Strategy
- Add native-preparation slots and transitions to World.
- Convert codegen driver entrypoints to consume world state.
- Keep the authoritative-plan contract explicit in tests and docs.
title: Compiler World: fold native preparation into world state
